idea-plugin.name: SalesEasyPackagingAssistant
idea-plugin.description:
SalesEasy Packaging Assistant - An IntelliJ IDE plugin that provides intelligent file packaging and configuration generation for sales management systems.

Key Features:

  • File Packaging: Support for selecting multiple files and folders with one-click packaging into ZIP files
  • Automatic Configuration Generation: Automatically detects files containing specific keywords (Event, EventImpl, Trigger, ScheduleJob, etc.) and intelligently generates scriptTrigger.xml configuration files
  • Version Management: Automatically tracks and manages export versions based on three-level paths (e.g., other.rainbow.inventoryview), with version numbers incrementing as V1.0, V2.0, V3.0, etc., and ZIP filenames appended with corresponding versions
  • Multiple Configuration Types Support:
    • Approval Event Configuration (ApprovalEvent) - filename contains Event
    • Workflow Event Configuration (WorkflowEvent) - filename contains Event
    • Visual Flow Configuration (StageProcessEvent) - filename contains Event
    • Auto Flow Configuration (AutoFlowEvent) - filename contains Event
    • Rule Event Configuration (RuleEvent) - filename contains Event
    • Schedule Job Configuration (ScheduleJob) - filename contains ScheduleJob
    • Trigger Configuration (Trigger) - filename contains Trigger (excluding Event)
  • Interactive Configuration: Through intuitive configuration dialogs, users can:
    • Select configuration type
    • Input object name
    • Select operation options (e.g., submit, agree, add, delete, etc.)
    • Select execution timing (validate, before, after)
    • Configure execution order
  • Automatic Path Recognition: Automatically generates class names based on file relative paths without manual input
  • Centralized Management: All configurations are unified and managed in a single scriptTrigger.xml file, automatically added to the ZIP package root directory
  • 中文: SalesEasy 销售易打包助手 - IntelliJ IDE 插件，支持文件打包、自动配置生成、版本号管理等功能
